title: Export Reports as PDF
problem_statement: Enterprise users cannot share reports with stakeholders who lack product access. The only current option is a live link requiring a login, which excludes finance, legal, and exec audiences who will not create accounts.
user_segments: Analysts and ops managers at mid-market and enterprise accounts
Internal stakeholders (finance, legal, execs) who need to consume reports without a product login
goals: Enable report export as a downloadable PDF that preserves layout, charts, and data tables
Reduce friction for sharing reports with non-product users
Unblock renewal conversations with enterprise accounts where export is a stated requirement
assumptions: Web-only export ships first; mobile PDF export follows in a later iteration
PDF rendering is handled server-side, not client-side
The reporting service design (dependency) will be finalised before engineering begins
risks: Large data tables may produce oversized PDF files — storage and delivery approach not yet decided
Mobile report layout is still in design; export may not support mobile layouts at launch
Premium vs. all-plans pricing decision not yet made — could affect scope and rollout timing
open_questions: Should PDF export be a premium feature or available on all plans?
What is the maximum acceptable file size, and how will large exports be handled?
Should the PDF include a footer with account name and date range by default, or make it configurable?
